metadata.description: Claude Forge — a suite of domain-agnostic Claude Code plugins sharing hook infrastructure via directory-level symlinks (session continuity, DevOps/AWS/Terraform, AI/LLM patterns, frontend & UI, engineering & code review).

plugins.name: ctk
plugins.description: Session continuity and context management (ctk, formerly continuity-toolkit) - 10 skills, 11 commands, 26 shared hooks, session persistence, delta-cache token compression, smart context monitoring, auto-continue handoff contract (PreCompact → SessionStart), and opt-in terminal window-title (CONTINUITY_TERMINAL_TITLE=1)

plugins.name: dtk
plugins.description: DevOps toolkit (dtk, formerly devops-toolkit) - 15 skills, 2 agents, 13 commands for infrastructure and backend development, including Husky pre-commit setup

plugins.name: atk
plugins.description: AI/LLM development toolkit (atk, formerly ai-toolkit) - 14 skills, 1 agent, 23 commands for AI-native development patterns

plugins.name: ftk
plugins.description: Frontend development toolkit (ftk, formerly frontend-toolkit) - 17 skills, 4 agents, 11 commands for UI/UX, design systems, browser automation, Google Stitch AI, and Remotion explainer videos

plugins.name: etk
plugins.description: Engineering practices toolkit (etk, formerly engineering-toolkit) - 24 skills, 4 agents, 19 commands for quality, architecture, Sentry investigation, ticket scope enumeration, codebase zoom-out, caveman terse-mode, and workflow orchestration
